summary: Global Plan A compressed Domain Planner inventories into index-only docs.

findings.message: Global Planner removed leaf docs from Domain Planner results to reduce the Worker task count.
evidence: api Domain Planner returned docs/api/http/orders.md as should
data Domain Planner returned docs/data/orders.md as should
Global Plan A kept only docs/api/index.md and docs/data/index.md
findings.required_action: Restore omitted leaf docs or record valid merge decisions that preserve expected content and acceptance criteria.

findings.message: A Domain Planner should document was absent from Plan A without a merge decision.
evidence: docs/api/http/orders.md missing from Plan A merge_decisions
findings.required_action: Preserve, merge, defer, or block the should document with an explicit reason.

findings.message: Activated domains with leaf-level evidence were represented only by index documents.
findings.required_action: Rebuild Plan A with leaf documents for activated domains.
